prompt: Set up an iterative design project for a SaaS landing page. Create the initial .op directory structure with PROJECT.md and DESIGN.md, then start the loop with a hero section design.

assertions.evidence: PROJECT.md, DESIGN.md, metadata.json, next-prompt.md files present
Contains sections 1-6: Vision, Design System, Devices, Screens, Roadmap, Ideas
Contains typography, colors, spacing, component specs
Contains project, version, createdAt, designs fields
Contains design and device fields in YAML format
